1.note: PK bolvormig, vaak iets hoekig; 6 colpi in driehoeken. Exine 1,5–2 µm. Eventueel 3 pollentypen.

outcome.text:
26.6.1 *Corydalis cava*-type (*C. cava* en *C. solida* p.p.)

*Corydalis cava* (L.) SCHWEIGG. & KORTE (2)
34,8–44,5 µm, MiW 39,1 µm; 50 PK, 0a

*Corydalis solida* (L.) CLAIRV. (2)
34,5–43,0 µm, MiW 40,2 µm; 50 PK, Oa

26.6.2 *Pseudofumaria alba*-type (*Pseudofumaria alba* en *Ceratocapnos claviculata*)

*Pseudofumaria alba* (MILL.) LIDÉN (2)
44,3–53,0 µm, MiW 48,4 µm; 50 PK, Oa

*Ceratocapnos claviculata* (L.) PERS. (2)
35,5–44,3 µm, MiW 40,3 µm; 50 PK, 0a

N.B. *Pseudofumaria lutea*: fossulaat en syncolpaat (meer colpi; oppervlak in vier- of vijfhoeken) — in proza genoemd, zonder aparte matenregel.

26.6.3 *Corydalis pumila*-type (*C. pumila* en *C. solida* p.p.)

*Corydalis pumila* (HOST) RCHB. (2)
31,8–42,0 µm, MiW 36,4 µm; 50 PK, Oa

*Corydalis solida* (L.) CLAIRV. (2)
34,5–43,0 µm, MiW 40,2 µm; 50 PK, Oa

26.6.4 *Corydalis intermedia*

Relatief kleine verrucae (tot 2 µm).

*Corydalis intermedia* (L.) MÉRAT (2)
26,0–32,0 µm, MiW 29,7 µm; 50 PK, 0a
